deductions.description: Lack of consistent body tension and extension during floor work (0:10-0:12).
Lack of consistent body tension and extension during floor work (0:15-0:17).
Lack of consistent body tension and extension during floor work (0:20-0:22).
Lack of consistent body tension and extension during floor work (0:25-0:27).

deduction_log.reason: General lack of precise body tension and extension in dance elements.

deductions.description: Bent knees during the Back Handspring block (KTM activated).
Slight pike/loss of body tension before the Back Tuck initiation.
Small step back on landing.
Chest low on landing.
Soft knees on landing (KTM activated).

deduction_log.reason: Minor form breaks in the handspring and landing, with slight pre-tuck piking.
deduction_log.strength_note: Good height and rotation on the Back Tuck.

deductions.description: Lack of full extension in legs/feet during dance movements (0:38.5-0:39.5).

deduction_log.reason: Minor lack of extension in one dance element.

deductions.description: Early heel drop before completion of 360-degree rotation.
Moderate relevé height during the turn.

deduction_log.reason: Early heel drop and moderate relevé reduce the quality of the turn.

deductions.description: Flexed feet visible during a small jump/pose (TPM activated).
Soft knees during a dance pose (KTM activated).

deduction_log.reason: Minor form breaks in feet and knees during dance elements.

deductions.description: Small hop forward on landing.
Soft knees on landing (KTM activated).

deduction_log.reason: Minor landing adjustment and soft knees on final landing.
deduction_log.strength_note: Strong, connected Back Handsprings with good block.

deductions.description: Legs slightly separated in inverted position.
Slight bent arm in support.
Flexed foot on descending leg (TPM activated).

deduction_log.reason: Minor form breaks in leg separation, arm tension, and foot point.

deductions.description: Insufficient split angle (approx. 160-170 degrees, not 180).
Slight flexed feet (TPM activated).

deduction_log.reason: Split not achieving full 180-degree extension and minor foot form.

special_requirements.requirement: Two acro passes (one with two flight elements)
special_requirements.comment: Performed a Round-off Back Handspring Back Tuck and a Round-off Back Handspring Back Handspring. The second pass has two flight elements.
Performed a split with an angle exceeding 120 degrees.

artistry.notes: The gymnast showed good energy and generally matched the music. Minor deductions for moments of neutral expression and inconsistent body tension in dance elements.

coaching_summary: The gymnast presents a clean Xcel Gold routine with good energy and musicality. The main areas for improvement are consistent body tension and extension throughout all elements, particularly in the knees and feet, and refining landing control. Addressing these foundational aspects will significantly enhance both execution scores and readiness for higher-level skills.
top_3_fixes: Maintain locked knees and pointed toes in all dance and acro elements, especially during transitions and landings.
Improve landing control by focusing on a stacked body position (CoM over base of support) to minimize hops and steps.
Increase relevé height and ensure full 360-degree rotation before heel drop in turns.
celebrations: Excellent energy and performance quality throughout the routine.
Strong and well-connected Round-off Back Handspring series.
Good rhythm and musicality in choreography.
